spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the named corner-shape values, superellipse() values, and exact parser rejection contracts for malformed corner-shape declarations.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes contract cards and a malformed-value button that attempts corner-shape: superellipse(foo) and reports the browser rejecting it through CSS.supports and CSSOM.

references.rationale: The see-also section now cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/5357329815699456 and the CSS Borders 4 corner-shaping spec.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Repaired with Chrome 148 / chrome-devtools-mcp verification. The gallery controls still update radius and color modes, the new contract cards pass for supported values and rejected malformed values, the malformed-value button confirms CSSOM keeps the valid squircle fallback, and the required ChromeStatus/spec references are present.
